heading: Privacy of assessment results
label: 7903 Privacy of assessment results
text: Any results from an individual assessment referred to in this chapter of a student that become part of the education records of the student shall have the protections provided in .section 1232g of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7903, , as added , , , set forth purpose of provisions relating to Native Hawaiian educational programs, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter IX of this chapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title IX, § 9203Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3798Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994
